references.text: Geerinck, DJL. 1977. Iridaceae. Flora Malesiana series 1, 8: 77-84
Goldblatt, P & DJ Mabberley. 2005. Belamcanda included in Iris, and the new combination I. domestica (Iridaceae: Irideae). Novon 15: 128-132.
Goldblatt, P. 2012. Systematics of Patersonia (Iridaceae, Patersonioideae) in the Malesian Archipelago. Annals of the Missouri Botanical Garden 98: 514-523.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 27 April 2024

species.citation: (Lemoine) N.E.Br. , Trans. Roy. Soc. South Africa 20 (1932) 264; ≡ Tritonia × crocosmiiflora (Lemoine) G.Nicholson , Ill. Dict. Gard. 4 (1887) 94; ≡ Montbretia × crocosmiiflora Lemoine , Garden (London, 1871-1927) 18 (1881) 188.
species.notes: A garden hybrid between Crocosmia aurea Planch. & Crocosmia pottsii (Baker) N.E.Br. Cultivated nearly worldwide and became naturalized in many places including mountainous parts of the Cordillera highlands.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 2 June 2024

species.citation: (Mill.) Urb. , Repert. Spec. Nov. Regni Veg. 15 (1918) 305; ≡ Sisyrinchium bulbosum Mill. , Gard. Dict., 8th Ed. (1768) n.3.
species.distribution: S America. LUZON: Albay (photos), MINDANAO: Zamboanga del Norte (photos).
species.notes: Note by P.B. Pelser (12-Mar-21): reported by J.P. Collantes from Albay as common on a ridge with clay soil and among cogon grass.

genera.last_edited: Edited by Pieter B. Pelser & Dave General, 17 July 2016

species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. MINDANAO: Davao Oriental.
species.notes: Only known from photographs from Mt Hamiguitan by Dave General.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 29 March 2025

species.citation: Van Geel , Sert. Bot. 2 (1829) 18 ; Hillard & Burtt, Notes Roy. Bot. Gard. Edinburgh 37 (1979) 297. = Gladiolus natalensis Reinw. ex Hook. , Bot. Mag. 58 (1831) t.3084, nom. illeg., nom. superfl. ; Geerinck, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 8 (1977) 83.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 4 November 2017

species.citation: (L.) Goldblatt & Mabb. , Novon 15 (2005) 129; ≡ Epidendrum domesticum L. , Sp. Pl., 1st Ed. (1753) 952. = Belamcanda chinensis (L.) Redouté , Liliac. (Redouté) 3 (1802) t.121 ; Robinson, PJS 6c (1911) 312; Merr., Fl. Manila (1912) 152; Merrill, EPFP 1 (1923) 220; Quisumb., Med. Pl. Philip. (1951) 181; Geerinck, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 8 (1977) 82; ≡ Ixia chinensis L. , Sp. Pl., 1st Ed. (1753) 36, nom. cons.
species.notes: Cultivated and locally naturalized in many tropical and subtropical countries.

species.citation: Goldblatt , Ann. Missouri Bot. Gard. 98 (2012) 521; Type: B.J. Stone et al. 16390 (BRIT, holo; BISH, iso), Mindoro: Mt Halcon, 14-Apr-1991. ≠ Patersonia lowii auct. non Stapf ; Merr., PJS 2 c (1907) Bot. 268; EPFP 1 (1922) 220; Geerinck, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 8 (1977) 79.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. MINDANAO: Davao Oriental, MINDORO, PALAWAN.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 21 November 2020

species.citation: L. , Mant. Pl. (1767) 122; ≡ Eleutherine palmifolia (L.) Merr. , PJS 7c (1912) 233 ; Fl. Manila (1912) 153; Sp. Blancoanae (1918) 104; Merrill, EPFP 1 (1923) 220; Quisumb., Med. Pl. Philip. (1951) 182; Backer & Bakh.f., Fl. Java 3 (1968) 150; Geerinck, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 8 (1977) 82. = Antholyza meriana Blanco , Fl. Filip., 1st Ed. (1837) 24 ; Fl. Filip. ed. 3, 1 (1877) t. 100; Merr., Govt. Lab. Publ. (Philip.) 27 (1905) 85.
species.distribution: Neotropics. LEYTE, LUZON: Benguet, Mountain Province, MINDANAO: Zamboanga del Norte, NEGROS.
species.notes: Cultivated and naturalized in the Philippines.
